summary: ADR-028 P1.8-9 seller shell foundation: white canvas tokens, 3-tab bottom nav (Home / Decisions / Juli), /decisions placeholder route, and /recommendations → /decisions legacy redirect.

interfaceChanges.description: Adds Quyết định tab at /decisions between Home and Juli.
Authenticated seller shell placeholder for Decisions sub-tabs (#192+).

mappings.criterion: Seller workspace renders white background on Home and Decisions
Bottom nav shows exactly 3 tabs Trang chủ Quyết định Juli
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue191_decisions_shell.test.tsx::renders exactly 3 bottom nav tabs: Trang chủ, Quyết định, Juli

mappings.criterion: /decisions loads authenticated seller shell without error
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue191_decisions_shell.test.tsx::loads authenticated seller decisions shell with placeholder content

mappings.criterion: seller --background resolves to white and nav renders 3 links
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_nav_header_redirects.test.tsx::defines 3-tab seller bottom nav without creator-matching links (#191)

mappings.criterion: web/MODULE.md documents new route and nav contract
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue191_decisions_shell.test.tsx::documents /decisions route and 3-tab nav contract in web/MODULE.md
